title: Activision Blizzard (ATVI) Intrinsic Value — Gemini DCF Analysis
description: An analysis of the intrinsic value of Activision Blizzard. Note that ATVI became a subsidiary of Microsoft on October 13, 2023, and is no longer traded independently.
methodology: DCF analysis is not applicable because Activision Blizzard became a subsidiary of Microsoft on October 13, 2023, and its current price data is unavailable.
